remaining_tasks.name: Spawn gsd-planner with the prepared prompt (3-plan breakdown: 47-01 pure logic, 47-02 schema+repo+player, 47-03 imports+UI+settings-export)

decisions.decision: Split original Phase 47 (stats + AutoEQ + bitrate) into 47 (bitrate only), 47.1 (SEED-005 buffer indicator), 47.2 (SEED-007 AutoEQ)
decisions.rationale: Three independent features with no shared code; bundled UAT and plans were incoherent. Decimals preserve existing Phase 48.
quality stays as user-facing tag; bitrate_kbps becomes the failover sort key. Lowest-disruption path; preserves user custom quality tags.

decisions.decision: Unknown bitrates (bitrate_kbps=0) sort LAST in failover queue
decisions.rationale: Partial-data-safe; fresh imports with known bitrates always win. Overrides roadmap's original 'fall back to position order' phrasing.

decisions.decision: Bitrate UX = QLineEdit + QIntValidator(0,9999) via QStyledItemDelegate, 5th column after Quality
decisions.rationale: Free numeric entry matches existing table style. Delegate pattern already exists (station_star_delegate.py).
Adding one column to an existing QTableWidget is mechanical; zero visual design decisions. Same approach as Phase 46.
